events.name: Borussia Dortmund at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund slumped to a 2-1 loss at Union Berlin in the Bundesliga on Saturday, only days after their record 7-1 demolition of Celtic.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund slump to defeat days after record win

video.headline: Yorbe Vertessen gets on the scoresheet for FC Union Berlin

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Yorbe Vertessen gets on the scoresheet for FC Union Berlin) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

headlines.description: Champions Bayer Leverkusen scored twice in the opening eight minutes but squandered their lead to settle for a 2-2 draw against visitors Holstein Kiel.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen waste lead to draw with promoted Kiel

video.headline: Jann-Fiete Arp scores penalty goal vs. Bayer Leverkusen
